'''Aduba-5''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Aduba system/Legends|Aduba system]].

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], a [[Black market/Legends|black market]] existed somewhere in between the [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of Aduba-5. An investigation for the exact locus was done from the nearby [[Skyrun Station]].<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Slicing|The Hidden Merchants}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
